utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Monica , betting the apartment , I do not know about this .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Rachel , I have not missed one question the whole game . I own this game ! Look at my hand .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I have not missed one question the whole game . I own this game !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Why ? Do you have the answers written on there ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_Do you have the answers written on there ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No ! Steady as a rock ! Now , are you with me .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: All right , gentlemen , you are up first .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You have 30 seconds . And the lightning round begins ... stop it ... now . What was Monica nickname when she was a field hockey goalie ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Correct . Rachel claims this is her favorite movie ...

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Correct . Her actual favorite movie is ...
